data.body:
[Event Notice]
Share your Kivotos memories and get a Pyroxene gift!
Senseis with the most votes will receive even better prizes, so be sure to participate!

🗓️Submission Period: 5/10 (Tue) – 5/22 (Sun)

#BlueArchive

⬇️Go to Blue Archive Awards⬇️
https://bluearchive.nexon.com/events/2022/05/contest![p3EBq6ZqUpmkkpM4h4JdJYCkS7wMvQrM.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/p3EBq6ZqUpmkkpM4h4JdJYCkS7wMvQrM.jpg)
